structured_fields.name: market_size
structured_fields.description: Global market size and forecast figures

current_value.description: Current global market value with year reference

forecast_value.description: Projected market value at forecast horizon

cagr.description: Compound annual growth rate over forecast period

example: Expanding diagnosis rates in emerging markets

structured_fields.name: regulatory_status
structured_fields.description: Regulatory approval status of key drugs across major regions

example.status: FDA approved 2011 — SLE and lupus nephritis
EMA approved 2022 — moderate to severe SLE

freetext_fields.name: reimbursement_access_narrative
freetext_fields.description: Narrative on reimbursement challenges, payer dynamics and patient access issues — include regional disparities where relevant

freetext_fields.name: competitive_landscape_narrative
freetext_fields.description: Narrative on the competitive dynamics — key players, market share considerations, positioning of approved and pipeline assets and any emerging threats or opportunities

prompt_hints.tone: commercially aware and analytically grounded — written for a pharma business audience
avoid: inventing market figures — if unavailable note as estimate or unavailable
vague competitive landscape statements without named players
ignoring access disparities between high and low income markets
prefer: market figures with source context where possible
regulatory status that distinguishes between indications and regions
competitive narrative that connects to pipeline and unmet needs already established
